transcript.title: Opening
transcript.text: Good morning Rushil Bhatia. Here is your daily news for Friday, July 3. In today's briefing: top headlines, bhopal and madhya pradesh, business and markets, money, tax and personal finance, science and technology, development and policy, across india, around the world. Let's begin.

transcript.title: Top headlines
transcript.text: First, the stories leading the news this morning. Beijing pushes for China-Pak-style economic corridor with Bangladesh and Myanmar. China is pushing for an economic corridor linking Bangladesh and Myanmar, mirroring CPEC's strategic importance. This initiative, discussed during Bangladesh PM Tarique Rahman's China visit, aims to boost connectivity, with China developing the Mongla port. Beijing has also expressed openness to other nations joining this "transnational initiative," which has drawn India's attention due to its proximity to the eastern border. Iran's Supreme Leader Mojtaba to skip father Ali Khamenei's funeral: Report. Iran's new Supreme Leader, Mojtaba Khamenei, will skip his father's funeral due to Israeli threats, according to a representative. This follows a stark warning from Iran's Foreign Minister to the US, citing Israeli remarks about Mojtaba Khamenei being "marked for death." Diplomatic talks in Doha reported positive progress on a Middle East MoU, with further discussions planned post-funeral. Ali Khamenei was killed in an airstrike on February 28. No sir: All regular teachers at two Delhi govt schools on SIR duty. Educators are questioning why classrooms are bearing the brunt of election duty, with entire teaching staffs at two Delhi government schools deployed for Booth Level Officer tasks. This leaves guest teachers to manage hundreds of students, raising concerns about inevitable academic loss, especially for board exam candidates. While acknowledging election importance, teachers advocate for equitable distribution of duties across schools to prevent educational disruption. Rahul Dravid 2.0? Samit's batting leaves fans stunned with uncanny resemblance. Samit Dravid's batting technique in the Maharaja Trophy drew immediate comparisons to his legendary father, Rahul Dravid, with fans noting the striking similarities. While his batting impressed, Samit is carving his own path as a pace-bowling all-rounder, having excelled in age-group cricket. Meanwhile, younger brother Anvay Dravid is also making strides as a wicketkeeper-batter, recently selected for India's U-19 squad. India's Tokyo drift: PMs open new chapter in ties. Japanese Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi's visit marked a significant advancement in India-Japan relations, with both nations forging new agreements in AI, energy, and defense. A roadmap for economic security was adopted to strengthen supply chains for critical minerals and semiconductors. Discussions also focused on enhancing bilateral trade through a review of the existing CEPA, underscoring a partnership built on deep mutual trust. After Meta layoffs, Zuckerberg says firms should empower workers, not replace them. Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg believes AI-driven job losses are exaggerated, advocating for tools that boost individual productivity. This comes as the tech giant laid off 8,000 employees, reassigning another 7,000 to AI projects, to offset significant investments in its AI "reboot." While Meta pours billions into AI infrastructure, Zuckerberg suggests a focus on human empowerment could create more jobs, a view contrasting with some industry leaders. Taylor Swift, Travis Kelce secretly married in intimate ceremony: Report. Pop sensation Taylor Swift and NFL star Travis Kelce have reportedly exchanged vows in a private ceremony, according to a New York Post report. Sources suggest the couple, both 36, are now legally married, with a grand celebration for over a thousand guests planned at Madison Square Garden later this week. This intimate union precedes a larger event, hinting at a significant milestone for the high-profile pair. Big fish being shielded in Ram Temple donation case, claim Congress and AAP. Congress has urged Prime Minister Modi to order a Supreme Court-monitored probe into alleged irregularities surrounding Ram Temple donations, terming it a "chanda chori mega scandal." Citing the UP government's SIT probe as an "eyewash," the party claims top officials are complicit. AAP leader Arvind Kejriwal echoed these sentiments, alleging powerful individuals involved in land deals and temple construction are being shielded while minor figures are arrested. Sergey Brin sold his NYC real estate: Here's what Mamdani's rent freeze cost him. Google co-founder Sergey Brin has divested his stake in a New York City real estate fund for a fraction of its value, selling for just six cents on the dollar. This significant loss comes as Mayor Zohran Mamdani's rent freeze tightens conditions for landlords. The fund, A and E Real Estate, confirmed the sale, citing the challenging market for rent-stabilized apartments. After WhatsApp, Centre sends notices to Telegram, Signal. Following a directive to Meta, the Indian government has now issued notices to Telegram and Signal, demanding explanations on their existing username systems. Authorities are seeking details on how these platforms prevent fraud, impersonation, and scams, giving them three days to respond. The government also questioned Telegram's continued offering of its username feature, citing concerns over potential cybercrime. PM Modi, Japan's Sanae Takaichi push for early Quad meet. Prime Minister Modi and his Japanese counterpart reaffirmed commitment to an early Quad summit, stressing freedom of navigation in the Strait of Hormuz and opposing restrictive measures. The joint statement unequivocally condemned cross-border terrorism from Pakistan, specifically mentioning groups like Jaish and Lashkar, and supported India's IEA membership. Both nations also voiced opposition to unilateral actions in the East and South China Seas.

transcript.title: Bhopal and Madhya Pradesh
transcript.text: Now, news closer to home in Bhopal and across Madhya Pradesh. 'Letter Chapter' Is Closed, Says Urban Development Minister Kailash Vijayvargiya. When he was asked to comment on the Congress's decision to boycott the electronic media (Maun Satyagrah), the minister said the Congress still had the mindset of emergency days and began to oppose the media. Hidden Pole Remnants Turn Rain-Soaked Roads Into Accident Traps In Bhopal. While most were removed safely, a significant number of metal remnants remain embedded beneath roads. Madhya Pradesh Government Threefold Hike For Blos, 50 percent Increase For Supervisors To Take Effect From April 2027. The government has also decided that honorarium payments will be made quarterly, with disbursements scheduled in June, September, December and March instead of a single annual payment. Police Headquarters And General Administration Department Officials Meet To Discuss Promotion Complications. Special DG, administration Adarsh Katiyar told Free Press that the PHQ has received the order of the state government and it is being examined in the context of the police department. Indore Municipal Corporation Grants Regular Pay Scale To 535 Daily-Wage Employees. The verification found that 535 employees met the minimum educational qualifications prescribed under the Madhya Pradesh Gazette notification dated July 15, 2015. MLA Disqualified, Bypoll In Madhya Pradesh's Datia To See Prestige Fight. Newly opened BMC building leaks after downpour in Bhopal. Zero Tolerance For AI Hallucinations That Act Like Bhopal Poison Gas For Law And Justice: Supreme Court. West Discom To Invest rupees 266 Crore In Power Capacity Expansion. The company will also install approximately 1,500 additional distribution transformers of 63 kVA, 100 kVA, 200 kVA and 315 kVA capacities. Lokayukta arrests retired inspector for taking rupees 1 lakh bribe in Bhopal. Madhya Pradesh: Monsoon likely to reach Ujjain and Gwalior-Chambal divisions today. Madhya Pradesh High Court Allows Woman's Plea For Abortion Despite Estranged Husband Remaining. Tripura CM Saha in Bhopal for national oral surgery convention. Subah Savere - Bhopal - 02 Jul 2026. Coaching institutes sealed over missing fire NOC. Snoring Nearly Ends Five-Year-Old Marriage: Madhya Pradesh Woman Seeks Divorce Over Husband's Disorder.

transcript.title: Business and markets
transcript.text: Moving to business, the economy and the markets. Tesla stock drops 8 percent despite strong second-quarter deliveries. Tesla shares dropped 8.3 percent to $390 on July 2 despite reporting record deliveries of 480,126 vehicles in Q2. This marks a 25 percent increase year-over-year but follows declining sales, partly due to consumer backlash against Elon Musk and reduced tax incentives. Danish brewing giant Carlsberg files IPO papers for India unit. Carlsberg has filed draft IPO papers with Sebi for its Indian business, following a trend of multinationals tapping India's equity markets. The move aligns with the company's strategy to unlock shareholder value amid growing primary market activity. Coal India's June supplies to power sector rise 5.9 percent on strong electricity demand. Coal India reported a 5.9 percent year-on-year increase in coal supplies to power plants, reaching 51.44 MT in June. The rise is attributed to peak summer electricity demand. Overall coal supplies rose 7.5 percent , with significant growth in the non-regulated sector, enhancing supply chain efficiency. Temasek to sell $200 million stake in Policybazaar via block deal. In May, PB Fintech co-founders Yashish Dahiya and Alok Bansal sold 0.8 percent stake in the company, while Chinese technology major Tencent exited its remaining 1.05 percent stake Hindustan Zinc reports record Q1 mined metal output for fifth straight year. Hindustan Zinc achieved record first-quarter production, with mined metal up 1 percent YoY to 268,000 kt. The company signed an MoU for green energy solutions and aims for net-zero emissions. However, shares dipped 16 percent in June amid silver price volatility and government stake sale rumors. Wall Street rises as Treasury yields ease after softer-than-expected jobs data. At 9:48 a.m. ET, the Dow Jones Industrial Average rose 0.86 percent , the S and P 500 gained 0.67 percent , the Nasdaq Composite gained 0.56 percent Devson Catalyst IPO opening date announced: Size, listing, and other details about the upcoming SME IPO. The IPO from Devson Catalyst Limited, slated from July 9-13, aims to raise rupees 42 crore. It features a mix of fresh equity and an offer for sale, with a final allotment expected on July 14 and listing on the BSE SME platform on July 16. Functional and Innovative Foods files DRHP with SEBI to raise funds via IPO. Functional and Innovative Foods Limited has filed its Draft Red Herring Prospectus for an IPO offering up to 85,00,000 equity shares. Proceeds will fund new manufacturing facilities, repay borrowings, and support its subsidiary, Christy Quality Foods. Adani-IHC entry may shake aluminium market. Adani Group is set to disrupt India's aluminium market with an $11.5 billion venture, challenging Hindalco and Vedanta. US stock market today: Wall Street edges lower as AI-fuelled tech rally loses steam; investors await jobs data. US stock futures traded mixed with Nasdaq futures down 0.8 percent and S and P 500 down 0.2 percent , amid concerns over AI stock ralliess. Caution grew ahead of US employment data. In Asia, semiconductor stocks like SK Hynix and Samsung fell over 8 percent as investors reassess valuations. Guardrails to curb EV battery tampering. Authorities are set to introduce stringent measures to prevent tampering with electric two and three-wheeler batteries. From data infra to deep tech: Technology themes investors cannot ignore. As India's tech landscape rapidly evolves, new opportunities arise. Discover how gig economy platforms and their challengers are reshaping investment priorities, from operational efficiencies to the burgeoning needs of a massive gig workforce. I-T steps up scrutiny of charitable trusts. The Income Tax Department is intensifying its review of charitable trusts and non-profits, demanding detailed fund utilisation and governance information. Expert view: Broader market to remain range-bound in medium term, says SKG Investment's Director. Expert view: Kush Gupta, Fund Manager at SKG Investment, predicts a cautious recovery for the Indian stock market in 2026, hinging on crucial macroeconomic factors. Gupta emphasises opportunities in defence, financial services, and pharma. Crude inventory hits 1-year high on imports. India's crude oil reserves have surged to a near one-year peak, reaching 104 million barrels by June's end. Why should you buy ETFs instead of stocks? Nithin Kamath of Zerodha explains. In a post on X, Kamath pointed to the recent performance of the IT sector to explain why diversified investing often works better over the long term. Signs of consumer resilience in auto: Sachin Relekar. Indian consumer demand shows surprising strength, with auto sales exceeding expectations across both traditional and electric vehicles. Top Gainers and Losers on 2 July: Zensar Tech, TCS, Coforge, Apollo Tyres, Bharat Forge, Anant Raj among top gainers. Dalal Street saw gains for the second consecutive day, driven by technology stocks and easing crude oil prices. Nifty 50 rose 0.71 percent to 24,175, while the Sensex gained 0.75 percent to 77,502. The Nifty IT index surged 4.5 percent , marking its biggest gain since January. Altman open to give 5 percent OpenAI stake to Uncle Sam. OpenAI is reportedly exploring a 5 percent equity stake for the U.S. Sensex jumps 600 points, Nifty 50 ends above 24,150; investors earn rupees 3 lakh crore. What drove the market higher?. The Sensex ended at 77,502.12, rising 579 points, or 0.75 percent , while the Nifty 50 rose by 170 points, or 0.71 percent , to end at 24,175.70. The Nifty Midcap 100 index rose by 0.48 percent , while the Smallcap 100 index jumped 1.25 percent . Government fast-tracks disinvestment process. The government is accelerating its disinvestment and asset monetisation drive, achieving 31 percent of its full-year target in just the first quarter. Tata Technologies shares jump 9 percent after expanding strategic partnership with Tenneco. Tata Technologies shares rose 9 percent to rupees 729.20 after announcing an expanded partnership with Tenneco LLC. The agreement involves over $100 million investment to enhance engineering innovation and digital transformation, leveraging India's engineering talent for global automotive needs. PM Modi and Takaichi set Maruti's next big ride rolling. Prime Minister Modi and his Japanese counterpart inaugurated Maruti Suzuki's expansive new manufacturing facility in Haryana, a significant investment bolstering India's automotive sector. Can Nifty 50 end 2026 on a high after a brutal first half? Top sectors and stocks that could deliver solid gains. After facing a near 9 percent drop in the first half of 2026, hopes for a potential rebound are high. With geopolitical tensions easing, lower oil prices, and a stabilising currency, investors are weighing bets on key sectors like banking, automobiles, and renewable energy for stronger performance ahead.

transcript.title: Money, tax and personal finance
transcript.text: Now to your money — taxes, savings and personal finance. I asked ChatGPT how many credit cards are too many; Experts filled in the gaps with what AI missed. Several banks have altered credit card rewards, which may make cardholders reassess how many cards they need. I asked ChatGPT how many credit cards are too many and experts filled in the gaps with what AI missed. 8th Pay Commission: How higher HRA, TPTA, and family units may raise Level 1 employee's salary by 65 percent. 8th Pay Commission salary calculator: Central government employee unions are pushing for significant changes in the 8th Pay Commission, demanding higher family unit counts, increased House Rent Allowance (HRA) and Transport Allowance (TPTA), and the merger of Dearness Allowance (DA) with basic pay. These bodies argue current provisions are insufficient for low-level employees, especially in major cities. How traders are choosing FTMO alternatives that match their trading style. Traders are increasingly exploring FTMO alternatives as prop trading firms proliferate. These firms offer diverse evaluation systems, trading rules, and payout structures, catering to individual risk appetites and trading styles. Understanding how these models align with your strategy, rather than just brand recognition, is crucial for success in the funded trading space. Working for a foreign client or firm while living in India? Don't miss this form to avoid paying income tax twice. Working for a foreign client means income may be taxed in both the foreign country and India. However, Indian residents can claim foreign tax credit by filing Form 67. Details here. Man dies in motor accident, family seeks rupees 2.25 crore in damages: Here's why SC fixes 'fair' compensation based on his ITR, sets a precedent. Manoranjan Pandey, who lost his life in the tragic accident in 2018, was the sole breadwinner of his family, according to the 2019 appeal filed in the Behrampur Motor Accident Claims Tribunal, and was running his own construction business and earning rupees 15 lakh per annum. Based on this, the claimant-appellants had sought a compensation to the tune of rupees 2.25 crore. New EPF Scheme 2026 comes into effect: Here's what changes and what remains the same for EPFO subscribers, explained. The government's new EPF Scheme 2026 has come into effect as part of the Social Security Code 2020. Today, we explore and explain how and what has changed for EPFO subscribers and what remains the same. Made less than rupees 1.25 lakh LTCG from equities this year, do you need to file ITR?. Even if your long-term capital gains from stocks are under rupees 1.25 lakh, you must still file your Income Tax Return for AY 2026-27. While this amount is tax-exempt, the Income Tax Department requires you to report these gains. Failure to disclose can lead to issues. Learn how to correctly report these gains in your ITR. EPS-2026 rules: Will you get pension if you leave your job before completing 10 years of service?. The central government has implemented EPS, 2026, replacing older pension schemes. Key provisions remain intact, but questions about eligibility for employees leaving before 10 years persist. Here's what the new rules say. PPF interest rate for July-September 2026: Has government changed 7.1 percent rate? Here's what investors should know. PPF interest rate: The Finance Ministry has maintained the Public Provident Fund (PPF) interest rate at 7.10 percent for the July-September 2026 quarter, keeping it unchanged from the previous period. Yen at record low: Should Indian investors be worried? Experts weigh in. The yen's weakness is not just a Japan story. For Indian investors, the impact is mostly indirect. While short-term volatility may rise if global carry trades unwind, experts agree that disciplined long-term investing remains the most effective way to navigate these macro cycles. Husband leaves some properties to sister through Will, excluding wife and children; Supreme Court upholds it for this reason. The Supreme Court has upheld a husband's Will, which disinherited his wife and children from certain properties, favouring his sister. The court ruled that excluding legal heirs does not automatically make a Will suspicious, especially when the testator stated he had already provided sufficiently for his family. This decision reinforces that a Will's validity hinges on its proper execution and the testator's clear intent, not solely on inheritance patterns. EPS-2026 replaces EPS-95: Does the rupees 1,000 minimum pension continue? Here's what has changed. The Centre has introduced the Employees' Pension Scheme (EPS), 2026, replacing older versions. While procedural changes have been made, the minimum monthly pension remains fixed at rupees 1,000, unchanged since 2014. EPS 2026 brings new rules, but has the rupees 1,000 minimum pension changed?. The government has introduced the Employees' Pension Scheme (EPS), 2026, replacing older schemes. The calculation formula for pensions also stays the same, based on pensionable salary and service. Bajaj Auto's rupees 5,632 crore buyback: How will your buyback proceeds be taxed?. Bajaj Auto's rupees 5,632.8-crore share buyback will be taxed under the new capital gains framework that came into effect on April 1, 2026, changing how shareholders report and pay tax on shares accepted in the buyback. e-OCI card launched: How OCI cardholder can generate and download electronic-OCI card. The government has officially launched e-OCI (Electronic OCI Card). Hindu Succession Act: When a woman's property may go to her husband's legal heirs before her own parents. Indian law governing a woman's property after her death without a will prioritizes her husband's heirs over her own parents. This outdated Hindu Succession Act, despite societal shifts where daughters are primary caregivers and financial supporters, leaves natal ties secondary to marital ones. While wills offer a solution, legislative reform is needed to reflect modern family realities and ensure parents are rightfully recognized in their daughter's succession line. Mis-sold insurance? How to challenge a forced insurance policy sold as an FD. If an insurance policy has been issued without informed consent or through misrepresentation, the policyholder has the right to challenge the transaction. Gold rate today (July 2, 2026): Check 24k, 22k, 20k and 18k gold jewellery prices from Joyalukkas, Malabar Gold and Diamonds, Tanishq and IBJA in Delhi, Mumbai, Hyderabad, other cities. Gold prices saw an uptick across major Indian cities on Thursday, July 2, 2026. Leading jewellers like Tanishq, Malabar Gold and Diamonds, Kalyan Jewellers, and Joyalukkas reported higher rates for 22K gold jewellery compared to the previous day. I asked ChatGPT how rich Indians must become for the country to be 'developed'; an expert adds what AI missed. 8th pay commission: Here's how much minimum estimate of 1.83 fitment factor can hike salaries for employees. 8th pay commission: With discussions underway, we calculate how much of a salary hike the minimum estimate of 1.83 fitment factor could provide for central government employees and pensioners. Here's a look... Why Schedule FA is about complete disclosures, not precise valuations. Indian residents with foreign stocks, employee stock ownership plan or bank accounts must disclose them in Schedule FA regardless of whether they were sold. Why every loan default deserves a different recovery strategy. AI and behavioural data can help lenders tailor debt recovery to each borrower's circumstances, improving repayments while replacing aggressive collections with more empathetic engagement. Think you don't need to file an ITR for FY 25-26? These 8 benefits may change your mind. ITR filing: Filing your Income Tax Return (ITR) offers significant advantages beyond just tax payment. It's crucial for claiming refunds, carrying forward losses to reduce future tax, and enhancing loan and visa application prospects. Even if your income is below taxable limits, filing might be mandatory under certain conditions. How ITR will decide motor accident compensation: SC issues new guidelines for salaried, self-employed and non-filers. The Supreme Court clarified income assessment for motor accident compensation, addressing salaried and self-employed individuals, and non-filers. Details here.

transcript.title: Science and technology
transcript.text: Next, science and technology. WhatsApp issues username FAQs amid govt scrutiny, Can someone find you with it? Could you be impersonated? Check details. Meta Platforms' messaging app WhatsApp has released detailed set of frequently asked questions (FAQs) for users on its new username feature following controversy over safety and security of the rollout. Oppo Reno 16, Reno 16c launched in India: Check price, specs and more. Oppo launched the Reno 16 series featuring Snapdragon processors and AMOLED displays. Prices in India start at rupees 46,999 for the Reno 16c and rupees 61,999 for the Reno 16 Meta plans to rent AI computing power as it takes on AWS, Google Cloud: Report. Meta is developing a cloud infrastructure to sell AI computing access, competing with AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud. WhatsApp usernames could open the platform to impersonations and scams, warn cybersecurity experts: Here is how. Meta's WhatsApp is launching usernames for privacy, enabling users to interact without disclosing phone numbers. While this can protect user identity, experts warn of risks like impersonation and scams, highlighting the necessity for robust anti-abuse measures to ensure safety amid these changes. Key details about iPhone 18 Pro leak online after hackers gain access to 630 GB data from Tata Electronics. Leaks from Tata Electronics reveal details about Apple's upcoming iPhone 18 Pro, including component suppliers and internal documents after a ransomware attack. This breach, involving over 200,000 files, threatens Apple's supplier relationships and business strategy ahead of the September launch. Samsung Galaxy A27 5G debuts in India with 120Hz AMOLED display, price starts at rupees 28,999. Samsung Galaxy A27 5G features a 6.7-inch Full HD+ Super AMOLED display, Snapdragon 6 Gen 3 chipset, 50MP triple rear camera, and 5,000mAh battery. OnePlus N6 5G launched in India with 8,000mAh battery, Dimensity 6360 Apex processor: Check price and specs. The OnePlus N6 features a 6.75-inch HD display, MediaTek Dimensity 6360 Apex processor, 8,000mAh battery, and military-grade durability. WhatsApp to let users reserve usernames from next week: Here's how it works. WhatsApp introduces a username system to eliminate the need to share your phone number. The company will allow users to select their usernames starting next week. WhatsApp to let users chat without sharing phone numbers: Username feature coming soon. WhatsApp, which says it has more than 3 billion users globally, has until now allowed users to be contacted by anyone who has their phone number. Will iPhone 17 Pro Max cost nearly rupees 2 lakh in India? Leak suggests so. The iPhone 17 Pro, currently priced at rupees 1,34,900, could reportedly retail between rupees 1,54,900 and rupees 1,69,900. The iPhone 17 Pro Max may be priced between rupees 1,84,900 and rupees 1,99,900, compared with its current price of rupees 1,49,900. Samsung Galaxy M47 5G launched in India with 6,000mAh battery, 50MP OIS camera. Samsung has launched the Galaxy M47 5G in India with a price of rupees 22,999. The phone features a Snapdragon 6 Gen 3 chipset, 6.7-inch AMOLED display, 6,000mAh battery, and a 50MP camera. Apple prepares smart glasses to take on Meta, launch tipped for next year. Apple is eyeing the smart glasses market, potentially releasing its first model next year. Apple could be looking to leverage its strong ecosystem to bring in buyers, a report claims iPhone 18 Pro launch date, expected price, processor and camera upgrades. Leaks suggest Apple's iPhone 18 Pro lineup may launch on September 8 or 9. The phone is expected to see a price of around $1,200-$1,300 iPhone 18 Pro, iPhone 18 Pro Max could see up to $200 price hike, says report. Apple could raise the prices for the upcoming iPhone 18 Pro models by up to $200. The iPhone 18 Pro could be priced at $1,200-$1,300, if the new report is to be believed Mint Explainer: Why quantum computing is the next geopolitical race. With multi-billion dollar investments and new US executive orders targeting a 2028 breakthrough, global powers are rushing to secure hardware superiority before 'Q-Day' upends modern encryption. Flipkart GOAT Sale: iPhone 17 gets rupees 12,000 discount, Pro models cheaper by up to rupees 22,000. Flipkart's GOAT Sale is beginning from July 4 with discounts on various products including the iPhone 17 series. The iPhone 17 will be priced at rupees 70,900, the iPhone 17 Pro at rupees 1,12,900, and the iPhone 17 Pro Max at rupees 1,27,900 Google limits Meta's use of its Gemini AI models: Report. Google has limited Meta's access to its Gemini AI models due to high demand. This has disrupted Meta's internal AI projects and affected other Google clients. Despite growing Google Cloud revenue, computing power constraints hindered further growth in the sector. Fake GTA 6 early access websites are stealing gamers' money: Here's how the scam works. Cybersecurity researchers warn that scammers are exploiting GTA 6 hype by offering fake early access for cryptocurrency payments. Soaring iPad, Xbox prices reveal pain of memory chip mess. Apple and Microsoft increased prices for Xbox consoles, Macs, and iPads due to a memory chip shortage driven by AI demand. Moto Pad 70 Pro launched in India with 13-inch 3.5K display, AI features and 10,200mAh battery. The Moto Pad 70 Pro features a 13-inch 3.5K display, Snapdragon 8s Gen 4 processor, and quad speaker setup. It supports 2TB expandable storage and runs on Android 16 OpenAI names Prabhjeet Singh India MD, launches GPT-5.6 Sol with stronger cyber protections. OpenAI has appointed Prabhjeet Singh as Managing Director for India. The company has also announced a limited release of its GPT-5.6 model, which features three variants: Sol, Terra, and Tuna iPhone 18 to get a big RAM upgrade as Apple doubles down on AI: Report. Apple is set to launch the iPhone 18 and iPhone 18e next spring with 9GB and the A20 chipset. The iPhone 18 lineup could also include improved AI features and brighter display, and better optics. India's robotics funding doubles in 2026 first-half, but scale seems far away. India's robotics sector continues to lag its global peers. In 2025, Indian robotics startups raised less than 1 percent of the capital secured by US robotics startups and about 2 percent of that raised in China, according to Tracxn.

transcript.title: Development and policy
transcript.text: Now to development, infrastructure and government policy. BIMSTEC, Northeast India, and an Overlooked Pillar of the Act East Policy. India's growing water deficit creates rupees 20 lakh crore opportunity for infrastructure firms: Report. Great Nicobar Project: National Security versus Ecology in India. Union Minister Dr. Jitendra Singh Highlights Bio-E3 Policy's Role in India's Green Transition at Indo Akashvani News. India strengthens green hydrogen push as ACME signs major export deals with Japanese firms. Localisation, policy support and ease of doing business key to making India a global EV hub: Industry leader. Trilegal Advises JSW Infrastructure On rupees 75 Billion QIP. Union Environment Minister presides over ASSOCHAM's National Conference on 'Electric Mobility: Building India an Electric Mobility Hub for Viksit Bharat'. Smart Metering Deployment in India Policy Framework, Institutional Structure and National Implementation Status. UAE's IHC, Adani plan $11.5 billion aluminium project in India's Odisha.

transcript.title: Across India
transcript.text: Turning to the big national stories. Fuel prices to be cut only if global oil markets stay stable for next few weeks: Hardeep Singh Puri. Petroleum Minister Hardeep Singh Puri addressed public concerns regarding ethanol-blended fuel, dismissing social media narratives as "make-believe." He clarified that any mileage reduction in E20-fuelled vehicles is minor, with potential benefits like improved acceleration. The ministry has released a detailed note to counter misinformation and reassure vehicle owners about the safety and established practice of ethanol blending, citing historical support from figures like Henry Ford. PM Modi, Japan PM Sanae Takaichi push for early Quad meet. Prime Minister Modi and his Japanese counterpart reaffirmed commitment to an early Quad summit, stressing freedom of navigation in the Strait of Hormuz and opposing restrictive measures. The joint statement unequivocally condemned cross-border terrorism from Pakistan, specifically mentioning groups like Jaish and Lashkar, and supported India's IEA membership. Both nations also voiced opposition to unilateral actions in the East and South China Seas. Delhi-Mumbai E-way contractor sacked for poor quality work: NHAI on viral video of damaged sections. A viral video showing a damaged section of the Delhi-Mumbai Expressway in Rajasthan has sparked renewed criticism. The National Highways Authority of India terminated the original contractor's agreement in April due to persistent poor performance. Repairs are underway by a new builder at the former contractor's expense, with micro-milling and permanent reconstruction planned after traffic diversion. Experts are investigating the cause of the pavement distress. Mehbooba Mufti, J and K politicians fly to Iran for Khamenei funeral. Mehbooba Mufti, the sole non-Shia politician from J and K and Ladakh, flew to Tehran for Ayatollah Ali Khamenei's funeral, an event arranged with a special aircraft due to suspended commercial flights. Several other prominent figures from the region were also invited. The invitation highlighted the deep historical and strategic ties between Iran and India, underscoring the significance of the attendees' presence. Amarnath Yatra 2026: J and K Lt Guv Manoj Sinha flags off 1st batch of pilgrims from Jammu. Jammu and Kashmir Lieutenant Governor Manoj Sinha initiated the 57-day Amarnath Yatra 2026 from Jammu, flagging off over 4,800 pilgrims. Extensive security, including armoured vehicles and aerial surveillance, is in place for the journey to the holy cave shrine. The pilgrimage, commencing July 3 and concluding August 28, aims to provide a safe and spiritually fulfilling experience for devotees. Telegram, Signal under Centre's scanner over username feature after WhatsApp. Indian authorities are ramping up their scrutiny of messaging apps, questioning both Telegram and Signal about their unique username features. This move mirrors previous discussions with WhatsApp concerning alarming trends in online fraud and impersonation. The government is keen on understanding how these platforms ensure user safety and traceability, prompting Telegram to clarify its current functionalities regarding username use. Which faction is 'real' Trinamool Congress? EC seeks claims, counterclaims from rival camps by July 6. The Election Commission has asked rival Trinamool Congress factions to submit claims regarding party signatories and organizational elections by July 6. This follows a meeting where rebel leader Ritabrata Banerjee presented his group's case, asserting they represent the "real" TMC with significant MLA support. The Mamata Banerjee camp, however, questioned the EC's decision to meet the rebels, alleging procedural violations and political influence. 'Op-eds on Gaza, silence on Sikhs': BJP questions Sonia Gandhi over Pakistan gurdwara demolition. The BJP has accused senior Congress leader Sonia Gandhi of exhibiting "double standards" by remaining silent on the reported demolition of a gurdwara in Pakistan, while frequently opining on the Gaza crisis. BJP spokesperson Shehzad Poonawalla highlighted this perceived hypocrisy, pointing to alleged mistreatment of minorities in Pakistan and other regions. India has officially condemned the gurdwara demolition, urging Pakistan to investigate. NHAI issues notices, suspends officials over Delhi-Dehradun expressway cave-in. In response to a road surface collapse on the Delhi-Dehradun Economic Corridor, the National Highways Authority of India has taken action. A show-cause notice has been issued to the project director, while several officials and the contractor now face suspension and possible debarment. The incident, linked to water accumulation and delays in the drainage system, has ignited criticism and calls for accountability. When chemistry beats caste: A quiet revolt is rewriting the oldest rule of arranged marriage. For generations, the first question in an arranged marriage was rarely about personality, ambitions or emotional compatibility. Material science expert appointed new Department of Science and Technology Secretary. He will take the place of Abhay Karandikar, the former Secretary, who was appointed as a Member in NITI Aayog in April this year. INS Trikand foils piracy attempt on merchant vessel in Gulf of Aden. According to the Navy, INS Trikand, a stealth frigate, quickly intervened during the piracy attempt on MV Golden Arsenal, carrying 21-member crew, under the flag of St Vincent and Grenadines TMC leader flags MPs' safety in letter to Speaker Om Birla after mob attacks Mahua Moitra in Nadia. Addressing a press conference in Delhi, Roy alleged that Moitra was attacked when she visited her constituency, but refused to leave the area immediately and stayed on until the situation eased. Narendra Modi, Sanae Takaichi discuss West Asia crisis, Ukraine conflict, condemn cross-border terror from Pakistan. Both New Delhi and Tokyo have consistently supported the two-state solution as a means to achieve lasting peace in the region. Shia leader Aga Hassan stopped from boarding Delhi-Tehran flight for Ayatollah Ali Khamenei funeral, his son claims. PDP MLA Aga Muntazir Mehdi, Hassan's son, claims immigration officials put a condition on his father's travel, which Hassan did not accept Ram Temple 'theft' row: Footage shows 5 key accused removing, hiding cash bundles. Agency claims it had no say in hiring counting staff, names came from bank Vijay's party welcomes 4 ex-ministers, several ex-MLAs as exodus from AIADMK continues. Influential leaders and former ministers M R Vijayabhaskar and C Vijayabaskar among those to join TVK in what is the biggest single political crossover since the 2026 Assembly election

transcript.title: Around the world
transcript.text: And finally, here is what is happening around the world. Venezuela quake survivor pulled out alive after eight days. Hernán Gil was trapped under a collapsed multi-storey car park, and encouraged them as they inched closer to him. 'Most massive' Russian attack on Kyiv kills at least 27. The latest barrage deployed the largest number of weapons on the capital and hit locations over a wide area. Vatican excommunicates followers of global Catholic sect. Around 600,000 followers of the Society of Saint Pius X, a Catholic sect, are affected. China says pilot crashed small plane into skyscraper for 'personal reasons'. The 66-year-old, who died in the crash, had anxiety and referenced "ending his life" in his diary. Former Olympian indicted for allegedly vandalising Washington Reflecting Pool. US authorities charged him with property destruction after renovations championed by President Donald Trump appeared to go awry. South Africa and Ghana in diplomatic row over alleged killing of migrant. South Africa denies claims that a Ghanaian citizen was killed in anti-migrant protests in Cape Town. Ebola treatments trial begins in the Democratic Republic of Congo. According to WHO data, there have been 1,406 confirmed cases of the disease in DRC, with 301 suspected cases and 438 deaths. Killers of British couple in South Africa sentenced to life. The pair had been collecting rare plants and seeds before their bodies were found days later in a river.

transcript.title: Sign-off
transcript.text: That is your briefing. Stay sharp, and have a strong day.
